scripts.eas:build:dev: EXPO_NO_CAPABILITY_SYNC=1 pnpm dlx eas-cli@latest build --profile development --platform all
scripts.eas:build:dev:ios: EXPO_NO_CAPABILITY_SYNC=1 pnpm dlx eas-cli@latest build --profile development --platform ios
scripts.eas:build:dev:android: pnpm dlx eas-cli@latest build --profile development --platform android
scripts.eas:build:preview: EXPO_NO_CAPABILITY_SYNC=1 pnpm dlx eas-cli@latest build --profile preview --platform all
scripts.eas:build:production: EXPO_NO_CAPABILITY_SYNC=1 pnpm dlx eas-cli@latest build --profile production --platform all
scripts.eas:build:ios: EXPO_NO_CAPABILITY_SYNC=1 pnpm dlx eas-cli@latest build --profile production --platform ios
scripts.eas:build:android: pnpm dlx eas-cli@latest build --profile production --platform android
scripts.eas:submit:ios: pnpm dlx eas-cli@latest submit --profile production --platform ios
scripts.eas:submit:android: pnpm dlx eas-cli@latest submit --profile production --platform android
